news.titleEn: Iran suggests MoU 'suspended' as 50 killed in US strikes in July
news.conclusionEn: Iran says the June ceasefire memorandum with the US is effectively dead after US strikes hit civilian infrastructure including a desalination plant, killing at least 50 people and wounding over 500 since July 6.
news.conclusionZh: 伊朗称美伊停火协议名存实亡，本月空袭已致50人死亡。
news.whyEn: Both sides now accuse each other of violating safe-passage guarantees through the Strait of Hormuz, a route carrying about a fifth of global oil shipments, keeping energy markets on edge.
news.whyZh: 双方互指违反霍尔木兹海峡安全通行协议，全球能源市场持续承压。
news.detailEn: Iran's health ministry reported that US strikes since July 6 have hit a seawater pumping station and power transformer at the Bunji desalination plant, bridges, rail lines and weapons depots, leaving thousands without water. Iran's deputy foreign minister said Washington had 'violated and suspended all its commitments' under the Islamabad memorandum signed in June, and Tehran has reciprocally suspended its own. President Trump reimposed a naval blockade on Iranian ports and revoked oil-export sanction waivers after Iranian tanker attacks. Both governments now accuse each other of breaching commitments to keep the Strait of Hormuz open to commercial shipping, with no diplomatic off-ramp currently visible.
news.detailZh: 伊朗卫生部称，美国自7月6日以来的空袭已击中Bunji海水淡化厂的抽水站和变压器、桥梁、铁路及武器库，导致大量民众断水。伊朗副外长表示，华盛顿已"违反并中止其在6月签署的伊斯兰堡备忘录中的全部承诺"，德黑兰也相应中止了自身承诺。特朗普总统在伊朗袭击油轮后重新对伊朗港口实施海军封锁，并撤销了石油出口制裁豁免。目前双方均指责对方违反了保持霍尔木兹海峡商船通行安全的承诺，尚未看到外交解决的迹象。

news.titleEn: Brent Oil Tops $90 as Middle East Attacks Threaten Hormuz Flows
news.conclusionEn: Brent crude jumped nearly 4% to above $90 a barrel, its highest since mid-June, after the US and Iran escalated strikes on vessels and infrastructure near the Strait of Hormuz over the weekend.
news.conclusionZh: 布伦特原油涨破90美元，为六月中旬以来最高。
news.whyEn: Higher crude prices raise fuel, shipping and manufacturing costs worldwide and complicate central banks' efforts to bring inflation down just as growth outlooks are already fragile.
news.whyZh: 油价上涨推高全球运输与制造成本，加大各国央行抗通胀难度。
news.detailEn: The rally followed attacks on vessels attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz and a strike on a key oil facility in Kuwait, with Iran saying its ceasefire with the US had effectively collapsed. The strait carries roughly a fifth of global oil shipments, and traders are pricing in a growing risk of prolonged disruption. US Energy Secretary Chris Wright said around two-thirds of pre-conflict traffic, about 14 million barrels a day, is still moving through the strait despite the fighting. Analysts warn that further escalation could push oil prices significantly higher heading into peak summer demand season.
news.detailZh: 此次上涨源于有船只在试图通过霍尔木兹海峡时遭到袭击，以及科威特一处重要石油设施被击中，伊朗表示与美国的停火已实质性破裂。该海峡承担全球约五分之一的石油运输量，交易员正为长期中断风险定价。美国能源部长赖特表示，尽管冲突持续，目前仍有约相当于冲突前三分之二的运量（约每日1400万桶）经海峡运输。分析人士警告，若局势进一步升级，在夏季用油高峰期油价可能大幅走高。

news.titleEn: Chip Stocks Tumble Into Bear Market as 105% AI Rally Fizzles
news.conclusionEn: Global chip stocks have erased about $3.3 trillion in market value since June 22, with the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index confirming a bear market after falling more than 20% from its June record.
news.conclusionZh: 全球芯片股市值蒸发3.3万亿美元，正式进入熊市。
news.whyEn: The selloff signals investors are questioning whether record AI infrastructure spending can keep justifying elevated valuations, a shift that could ripple through tech-heavy indexes and retirement portfolios worldwide.
news.whyZh: 投资者开始质疑AI基建投入能否支撑高估值，冲击全球科技股。
news.detailEn: The Philadelphia SE Semiconductor Index (SOX) sank about 10% last week, its steepest weekly drop in over a year, closing more than 20% below its late-June peak of 14,655 points. Sentiment was hit hard by the debut of Kimi K3, a large open-weight AI model from Chinese startup Moonshot AI priced far below leading US systems, which revived fears that China can build competitive AI cheaply. Memory-chip makers Micron, Samsung and SK Hynix were dragged into their own bear market, with Micron down roughly 30% from its high even as AI demand remains strong. Analysts are split between calling this a healthy 'mid-cycle reset' and a warning sign that the AI capex boom is overextended.
news.detailZh: 费城半导体指数（SOX）上周下跌约10%，创一年多来最大单周跌幅，较6月末14655点的高点回落超过20%，正式进入技术性熊市。中国创业公司月之暗面发布的开放权重大模型Kimi K3定价远低于美国主流模型，重燃了市场对中国能以更低成本打造有竞争力AI的担忧，拖累市场情绪。美光、三星、SK海力士等存储芯片厂商也被拖入各自的熊市，美光股价较高点回落约30%，尽管AI需求依然强劲。分析师对此看法分歧：一方认为这是健康的"周期中段调整"，另一方则担忧AI资本开支热潮已经过度。

news.titleEn: Andy Burnham to become UK's prime minister after being declared Labour Party leader
news.conclusionEn: Andy Burnham, the former mayor of Greater Manchester, is being installed as the UK's new prime minister, succeeding Keir Starmer after being declared Labour Party leader with near-unanimous support.
news.conclusionZh: 前曼彻斯特市长伯纳姆接任英国首相，接替斯塔默。
news.whyEn: The leadership change follows a Labour party crisis after poor local election results, and Burnham's left-leaning, anti-austerity platform signals a potential shift in UK economic and housing policy.
news.whyZh: 工党换帅或预示英国经济、住房政策转向左翼路线。
news.detailEn: Burnham was declared Labour leader on Friday after securing nominations from 379 of the party's 403 MPs, running effectively unopposed following Starmer's resignation announcement in June amid a party leadership crisis triggered by poor May local election results. Starmer formally resigns to King Charles III, who then invites Burnham to form a government, making him Britain's seventh prime minister in a decade. Burnham, largely unknown outside his home region, has pledged to make the cost-of-living crisis 'front and centre of government' and to pursue the 'biggest rebalancing' of power away from Westminster in modern British history. He has also criticized Donald Trump for bringing 'instability' to global politics.
news.detailZh: 伯纳姆在获得工党403名议员中379人的提名支持后，于上周五被正式确认为工党党魁，此前斯塔默因5月地方选举失利引发的党内危机于6月宣布辞职，伯纳姆此次几乎是在无对手情况下当选。斯塔默将正式向查尔斯三世国王递交辞呈，随后国王将邀请伯纳姆组建政府，使其成为英国十年内的第七位首相。此前长期担任大曼彻斯特市长、在英国其他地区知名度不高的伯纳姆承诺将"把生活成本危机置于政府工作核心"，并推动英国现代史上"最大规模的权力下放"。他此前还批评特朗普给全球政治带来了"不稳定性"。

news.titleEn: Russia launches largest ballistic missile attack on Kyiv since start of war
news.conclusionEn: Russia fired 41 ballistic missiles and 125 drones at Ukraine overnight, with the barrage on Kyiv the largest since the war began in 2022, killing at least one person and wounding 16 in the capital alone.
news.conclusionZh: 俄罗斯对基辅发动开战以来最大规模弹道导弹袭击。
news.whyEn: The escalation underscores Ukraine's worsening shortage of Patriot air-defense interceptors and raises pressure on Western allies to approve further military aid as the war grinds into its fifth year.
news.whyZh: 乌克兰防空拦截弹短缺，西方盟友或面临更大援助压力。
news.detailEn: Ukrainian air defenses intercepted roughly half the missiles and 108 of the 125 drones, but the barrage still sparked fires across several Kyiv districts, damaging residential buildings, offices and a dormitory, with nearly 600 emergency personnel responding. Additional casualties were reported in Kharkiv, Zaporizhzhia, Donetsk, Kherson, Dnipropetrovsk and Odesa. Acting Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha called it 'a brutal terrorist attack' and urged 'devastating pressure on Moscow.' The attack came amid domestic political tension in Kyiv following President Zelenskyy's dismissal of his defense minister, adding strain to Ukraine's wartime leadership.
news.detailZh: 乌克兰防空系统拦截了约一半的导弹以及125架无人机中的108架，但袭击仍在基辅多个城区引发火灾，损毁住宅楼、写字楼及一处宿舍，近600名应急人员参与救援。哈尔科夫、扎波罗热、顿涅茨克、赫尔松、第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克和敖德萨等地也报告了伤亡。乌克兰代理外长西比加称此次袭击为"残忍的恐怖袭击"，呼吁对莫斯科施加"毁灭性压力"。此次袭击正值泽连斯基总统解除国防部长职务引发国内政治紧张之际，令乌克兰战时领导层面临更大压力。

news.titleEn: June CPI report cuts Fed July rate-hike odds sharply
news.conclusionEn: June US CPI rose 3.5% year-over-year, cooler than the 3.8% expected, cutting market-implied odds of a July 29 Fed rate hike from about 46% to below 17% while September rate-cut odds also fell.
news.conclusionZh: 6月CPI低于预期，美联储7月加息概率大幅下降。
news.whyEn: The data eases near-term fears of Fed tightening that had rattled equity and bond markets, but traders still see a roughly 60% chance of a rate hike later this year under hawkish new Chair Kevin Warsh.
news.whyZh: 通胀数据缓和加息担忧，但年内加息可能性依然较高。
news.detailEn: Core CPI slowed to 2.6% year-over-year versus an expected 2.8%, prompting the CME FedWatch tool to slash the probability of a 25-basis-point hike at the Fed's July 29 meeting from roughly 46% before the report to under 17% afterward. Odds of a September rate cut also fell, from nearly 76% to about 50%, as traders repriced the path of policy under new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh, who has repeatedly said 'prices are too high' despite the softer data. Bank of America still projects three quarter-point hikes later in 2026 if inflation reaccelerates. The Fed's next decision is scheduled for July 29.
news.detailZh: 核心CPI同比升至2.6%，低于市场预期的2.8%，促使芝商所FedWatch工具将7月29日美联储会议加息25个基点的概率从公布前的约46%骤降至公布后的不到17%。9月降息概率也从近76%降至约50%，交易员据此重新评估新任美联储主席沃什领导下的政策路径，尽管数据转弱，沃什仍多次强调"物价仍然过高"。美国银行仍预计若通胀反弹，2026年下半年美联储将加息三次，每次25个基点。美联储下一次利率决议定于7月29日公布。

news.titleEn: Google Gemini Launch Delayed as Tech Falls Short of Internal Goals
news.conclusionEn: Google has delayed the release of its flagship Gemini 3.5 Pro model by several months after internal testing showed it fell short of coding and complex-reasoning targets, despite retraining the model in June.
news.conclusionZh: 谷歌旗舰模型Gemini 3.5 Pro因编程能力不达标推迟发布。
news.whyEn: The delay fuels investor concern that Google is losing ground to Anthropic and OpenAI in the AI race just as all major tech firms face pressure to prove their AI spending is paying off in upcoming earnings.
news.whyZh: 谷歌AI进度落后引发投资者担忧，加剧科技股AI支出争议。
news.detailEn: Google had said in May it expected to ship Gemini 3.5 Pro in June, but the model missed internal goals on coding performance and long-horizon reasoning tasks even after engineers reset and updated its training data late last month. Ten current and former employees described internal frustration, with concern the company is losing ground as rivals ship models that outperform Gemini on key benchmarks. CEO Sundar Pichai has acknowledged Google runs 'a bit behind' on agentic coding and has formed a dedicated DeepMind coding team to close the gap. A Google spokesperson said the company is currently testing 3.5 Pro with partners alongside an upgraded Flash model.
news.detailZh: 谷歌今年5月曾表示预计6月发布Gemini 3.5 Pro，但即便工程师上月末重置并更新了训练数据，该模型在编程能力和长链条复杂推理任务上仍未达到内部目标。十位现任及前任员工透露公司内部存在挫败情绪，担心竞争对手的模型已在关键基准测试中超越Gemini，公司正在失去优势。CEO劈柴（Sundar Pichai）承认谷歌在智能体编程方面"稍显落后"，并已组建专门的DeepMind编程团队以缩小差距。谷歌发言人表示，公司目前正与合作伙伴测试3.5 Pro及升级版Flash模型。

businessTips.explanationEn: A network effect occurs when a product or platform becomes more valuable to each user as more people use it, such as a marketplace, social network or messaging app. This creates a powerful moat because new entrants must overcome the existing user base to compete, and it often leads to winner-take-most market dynamics. Businesses with strong network effects can grow faster and defend pricing power more easily than those without them.
businessTips.explanationZh: 网络效应指产品或平台随着用户数量增加而对每个用户变得更有价值，例如市场平台、社交网络或即时通讯应用。这构成了强大的护城河，因为新进入者必须克服现有用户基数的优势才能竞争，往往会形成"赢家通吃"的市场格局。拥有强网络效应的企业通常比缺乏网络效应的企业增长更快，也更容易维持定价权。
businessTips.exampleEn: A ride-hailing app becomes more useful as more drivers join, which attracts more riders, which in turn attracts more drivers, creating a self-reinforcing loop that is hard for a new competitor to replicate from scratch.
businessTips.exampleZh: 网约车应用随着司机数量增加而变得更有用，这会吸引更多乘客，进而吸引更多司机加入，形成自我强化的循环，新竞争者很难从零开始复制这种优势。

businessTips.explanationEn: An MVP is the simplest version of a product that lets a founder test a core assumption with real customers before investing heavily in building out full features. The goal is to learn as fast and cheaply as possible whether people actually want what you're building, rather than guessing based on internal opinions. This approach reduces wasted effort and helps side-hustle founders avoid spending months on features nobody asked for.
businessTips.explanationZh: 最小可行产品（MVP）是产品最简化的版本，让创始人能在投入大量资源开发完整功能之前，用真实用户来验证核心假设。其目标是尽可能快速、低成本地验证人们是否真的需要你正在打造的东西，而不是凭内部主观判断猜测。这种方法能减少无谓的投入，帮助副业创业者避免花费数月开发无人需要的功能。
businessTips.exampleEn: Instead of building a full mobile app, a founder testing a meal-planning idea could start with a simple weekly email newsletter of recipes, seeing if people actually sign up and stay engaged before writing a single line of app code.
businessTips.exampleZh: 创始人想验证一个膳食规划的点子，与其直接开发完整的手机App，不如先做一份简单的每周食谱邮件订阅，观察是否有人愿意订阅并持续参与，再决定是否投入开发App。

businessTips.explanationEn: Dollar-cost averaging means investing a fixed amount of money at regular intervals, regardless of whether prices are high or low, instead of trying to time the market with a single lump-sum purchase. Over time this smooths out the average price paid, buying more shares when prices are low and fewer when prices are high. It won't beat lump-sum investing in every scenario, but it reduces the emotional stress and timing risk that leads many investors to make poor decisions during volatile periods.
businessTips.explanationZh: 定投（分批定额投资）是指按固定金额、固定周期持续投资，而不论价格高低，而不是试图通过一次性大额买入来精准择时。长期来看这能平滑平均买入成本，价格低时买入更多份额，价格高时买入更少份额。定投不一定在所有情况下都跑赢一次性投资，但能降低市场剧烈波动期间因情绪化决策而导致的择时风险。
businessTips.exampleEn: With chip stocks and oil prices swinging sharply this week on the Iran conflict and AI selloff, an investor using DCA would keep investing the same amount into their index fund on schedule rather than trying to guess the bottom.
businessTips.exampleZh: 本周芯片股和油价因伊朗冲突及AI股抛售剧烈波动，采用定投策略的投资者会按计划持续投入固定金额到指数基金，而不是试图猜测市场底部。
